title.en: Why has Trump stayed away from the World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 为什么特朗普远离世界杯？

summary.en: Why has Donald Trump stayed away from the World Cup? And will he appear before the final?
summary.zh-CN: 为什么唐纳德·特朗普远离世界杯？他会出现在决赛之前吗？

title.en: Arsenal poised to make Guimaraes offer after talks
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳准备在会谈后向吉马良斯出价

summary.en: Arsenal are poised to make an offer for Newcastle's Bruno Guimaraes after exploratory talks over potential moves for the Brazil midfielder and team-mate Sandro Tonali.
summary.zh-CN: 在就巴西中场和队友桑德罗·托纳利（ Sandro Tonali ）的潜在转会进行探索性谈判后，阿森纳准备向纽卡斯尔的布鲁诺·吉马良斯（ Bruno Guimaraes ）提出要约。

title.en: Why there's more to Spain than Lamine Yamal - Azpilicueta
title.zh-CN: 为什么西班牙不仅仅是Lamine Yamal - Azpilicueta

summary.en: Former Spain captain Cesar Azpilicueta explains why La Roja head coach Luis de la Fuente has the team and squad he needs for success in the next month.
summary.zh-CN: 前西班牙队队长塞萨尔·阿斯皮利奎塔（ Cesar Azpilicueta ）解释了为什么拉罗哈主教练路易斯·德拉富恩特（ Luis de la Fuente ）拥有下个月取得成功所需的球队和阵容。

title.en: The 0-0 draw that highlighted flaw in World Cup format
title.zh-CN: 0-0平局突出了世界杯格式的缺陷

summary.en: Doubts rise over the World Cup's format as the first of the two group games that give the two teams a chance to progress with a draw finishes 0-0.
summary.zh-CN: 作为两场小组赛中的第一场比赛，两支球队有机会以0-0的平局取得进展，对世界杯的格式产生了怀疑。

title.en: Where has it gone wrong for Bielsa's struggling Uruguay?
title.zh-CN: Bielsa陷入困境的乌拉圭哪里出了问题？

summary.en: With Uruguay possibly on the brink of elimination from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.
summary.zh-CN: 随着乌拉圭可能处于2026年世界杯淘汰赛的边缘，英国广播公司体育台在色彩缤纷的教练马塞洛·别尔萨（ Marcelo Bielsa ）的带领下审视了他们出了什么问题。

title.en: Japan and Sweden draw takes both into last 32
title.zh-CN: 日本和瑞典平局都进入了最后32名

summary.en: Daizen Maeda's smart finish to Japan's team goal is cancelled out by Anthony Elanga's long-range strike as Sweden fight back in a 1-1 draw that takes both sides through to the World Cup knockout...
summary.zh-CN: 前田大全（ Daizen Maeda ）对日本队进球的聪明成绩被安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）的长程罢工所抵消，因为瑞典以1-1平局反击，将双方带入世界杯淘汰赛......

title.en: Chelsea close in on Lacroix - Saturday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 切尔西近距离接触拉克鲁瓦-周六的流言蜚语

summary.en: Chelsea close in on Crystal Palace centre-back Maxence Lacroix, Newcastle United add Borussia Dortmund midfielder Felix Nmecha to their shortlist, while three Premier League clubs are chasing Uruguay...
summary.zh-CN: 切尔西接近水晶宫中后卫马克森斯·拉克鲁瓦（ Maxence Lacroix ） ，纽卡斯尔联队将多特蒙德中场球员费利克斯·恩梅查（ Felix Nmecha ）列入候选名单，而三家英超俱乐部正在追逐乌拉圭...

title.en: Why are World Cup underdogs doing so well?
title.zh-CN: 为什么世界杯失败者表现如此出色？

summary.en: Are the surprise results achieved by lower-ranked teams in the World Cup a matter of luck - or clever planning and execution?
summary.zh-CN: 排名较低的球队在世界杯上取得的惊人成绩是运气问题还是巧妙的规划和执行问题？

title.en: World Cup quiz: Who are England's top appearance-makers?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：谁是英格兰顶级外观设计师？

summary.en: Test your knowledge of the players who have featured at least 10 times for England at World Cups.
summary.zh-CN: 测试您对在世界杯上为英格兰队出场至少10次的球员的了解程度。

title.en: US interested in hosting 2038 World Cup - Giuliani
title.zh-CN: 美国有兴趣主办2038年世界杯-朱利安尼

summary.en: The United States could consider making a bid to host the men's 2038 World Cup, with Fifa considering expanding the tournament to 64 teams.
summary.zh-CN: 美国可以考虑申办男子2038年世界杯，国际足联考虑将比赛扩大到64支球队。

title.en: World Cup fans frustrated by 'confusing and expensive' tipping culture in US
title.zh-CN: 世界杯球迷对美国“令人困惑且昂贵”的小费文化感到沮丧

summary.en: International fans visiting the US for the World Cup have become frustrated by the culture of having to tip servers, telling the BBC that tipping fatigue has set in.
summary.zh-CN: 前往美国观看世界杯的国际球迷们对不得不向服务器支付小费的文化感到沮丧，他们告诉英国广播公司，小费疲劳已经开始。

title.en: Pattinson signs new deal with London City Lionesses
title.zh-CN: Pattinson与London City Lionesses签署新协议

summary.en: London City Lionesses has announced England defender Poppy Pattinson has extended her contract until summer 2029.
summary.zh-CN: 伦敦城市女狮队宣布英格兰后卫Poppy Pattinson将她的合同延长至2029年夏天。

title.en: 'Oh my word!' - Elanga 'stunner' draws Sweden level
title.zh-CN: “哦，我的天！” - Elanga的“stunner”吸引了瑞典的水平

summary.en: Anthony Elanga scores a brilliant curling effort from the edge of the area to draw Sweden level with Japan in their FIFA World Cup Group F match at Dallas Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）在达拉斯体育场（ Dallas Stadium ）举行的国际足联世界杯F组比赛中，从该地区的边缘进行了精彩的冰壶比赛，将瑞典与日本拉平。

title.en: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures under way the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛的举行，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: Beccacece goes from brink to World Cup history with Ecuador
title.zh-CN: 与厄瓜多尔一起探索贝卡塞斯的世界杯历史

summary.en: Sebastian Beccacece was on the verge of losing his job as Ecuador head coach as the clock ticked down against Germany - now he has a last-32 match to look forward to.
summary.zh-CN: 塞巴斯蒂安·贝卡塞斯（ Sebastian Beccacece ）在对阵德国的比赛中即将失去厄瓜多尔主教练的职位-现在他有最后一场32场比赛值得期待。

summary.en: Ivory Coast boss Emerse Fae says comments from ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger about their "wild" playing style could be considered racist.
